productDisplayName: Nike Men Free Trainer White Sports Shoes
description: Ultra light, durable and flexible, the nike Free Trainer 5.0 is constructed with a seamless upper fixated with light-weight layers of Hyperfuse material. The upper on these switches between white and reflective silver, with a streak of matte silver in the swoosh. The underside is brighter, with a primarily neon orange outsole that gets hits of purple on the outer traction pods. The nike Free Trainer 5.0 delivers a flexible, sock-like Fit, excellent support and multi-surface traction that stands up to abuse during field drills, running or lifting.UpperFeatures a no-sew construction, inner mesh, and a dynamic fit systemMildly padded tongue and sockliner for in-step comfortDual-pull lacing system for lockdown and personalised fitMidsoleFull length Phylon midsole for lightweight cushioning and impact protectionFull inner sleeve made of lightweight mesh for comfort and breathabilityOutsoleDiamondFLX traction brings flexible, multidirectional gripSolid rubber pods in the heel and perimeter of the forefoot are configured in an aggressive, delta-node pattern for added traction and durabilityNike Free technology in the medial midfoot for barefoot feel and natural fitshoe careWipe surface with damp, clean cloth to remove dustDo not machine washDo not store in direct sunlight
